description: Parse the user query to extract the number for factorial calculation and generate the appropriate function call JSON

inputs.name: prompt
inputs.description: The raw user query containing the factorial calculation request and number to process

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: JSON string containing the available functions and their parameter schemas for validation

output.description: Returns a function call object with the function name as the top-level key and parameters as nested object. Example: {"math.factorial": {"number": 5}} where the number is extracted from the user query.

fields.math.factorial: dict containing the number parameter as integer

workflow_spec.name: Calculate Factorial Function Call
workflow_spec.description: Parse user query to extract function name and parameters, then generate a function call JSON for factorial calculation
